title: abeec Building Bricks Storage Case with Handle - Carry Case for Kids Building Blocks - Storage Box Includes 17 Storage Compartments and Base Plate for Building Blocks
features: Block Tech Building Blocks Storage Case – Building Blocks Storage Box – Building Block Sets For Boys - Organiser Box To Hold Stickle Bricks, Lego Bricks Or Building Bricks.
Toy Storage Case – This Is The Ideal Portable Organiser For Building Block Toys – Gather All Your Bricks In The Block Tech Storage Box - Compatible As A Lego Box, Lego Storage And Lego Storage Box

Plane Activities For Kids - Storage Box For Building Blocks - Carry Case For Kids – This Is An Ideal Travel Toy For Boys And Girls – The Handle On The Storage Case Ensures Kids Can Carry All Their Building Blocks With Them – Kids Can Play With Their Building Blocks Wherever They Travel
Base Plate on the top of the suitcase. Contents Include: 17 x Different Sized Storage Compartments for Branded Building Blocks, 1 x Baseplate which is compatible with leading brands

Compartment Box - Ideal For Sorting Your Building Blocks - Compatible With Major Brands – This Is The Ideal Additional Gift For Girls Or Present For Boys Who Love Building And Creating – Complete Your Building Block Collection With This Must Have Storage Case For Kids
